summary: Iteration 10: Docker deployment stack testing - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with proper API URL configuration. No 'undefined' in API requests.

features_verified.api_prefix_routing: ✅ All /api/* routes properly handled through nginx
features_verified.login_flow: ✅ POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials, returns token + user info
features_verified.me_endpoint_auth: ✅ GET /api/auth/me requires and validates JWT token
features_verified.crud_update: ✅ PUT /api/computers/{serial_no} updates item, PATCH /api/computers/{serial_no}/status updates status
features_verified.crud_delete: ✅ DELETE /api/computers/{serial_no} deletes item (200), GET returns 404 after
features_verified.csv_export: ✅ GET /api/export/csv returns text/csv with proper headers
features_verified.admin_users: ✅ GET /api/admin/users returns user list with last_login field
features_verified.no_undefined_urls: ✅ No 'undefined' found in any API request URLs
features_verified.setup_page_redirect: ✅ /setup redirects to /login when setup already complete
features_verified.login_page_elements: ✅ Login page has data-testid elements: login-username-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button
features_verified.dashboard_after_login: ✅ Dashboard loads with inventory table, sidebar navigation
features_verified.add_computer_form: ✅ /add page loads with full intake form
features_verified.user_management: ✅ /users page shows user table with Last Login column

critical_code_review_comments: API configuration centralized in /app/frontend/src/utils/api.js with helpful error logging for missing REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
All pages (LoginPage, SetupPage, AuthContext) correctly import API_BASE from utils/api.js
Setup status check runs on login page mount, correctly redirects to /setup if setup_required=true
SetupPage correctly redirects to /login when setup_required=false - no auth bypass vulnerability
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST-ITER10-* test computers. Existing records: TEST-BATCH-001, UI-FORM-SAVE-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 fully verified Docker deployment stack: (1) Environment Variables: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://inventory-mgmt-52.preview.emergentagent.com is properly set and used, no 'undefined' in requests. (2) API prefix routing: All /api/* routes work through nginx. (3) Setup/Login flow: /api/setup/status accessible without auth; /setup redirects to /login when setup complete; login flow works with admin/Admin@12345. (4) CRUD: Full create/read/update/delete cycle tested and verified. Current DB: 4 users (admin, testtech_ui, testtech_final, test_tech_iter8); 2 computers (TEST-BATCH-001, UI-FORM-SAVE-001).
